summary: Record the bounded aggregate suite after the C10 presentation/context and Appendix B schema slices: all 168 test files and 1258 tests pass.

decisions.decision: Retain one bounded repository-wide test run after the AI and MCP contract changes; do not repeat the suite absent a new cross-boundary change or a failure requiring diagnosis.
decisions.rationale: The new UI/runtime wiring crosses application and presentation boundaries, so one aggregate falsification pass is required while the no-loop rule forbids redundant cycles.

testEvidence.criterion: The complete local suite remains green after the C10/C11 slices.
testEvidence.test: Run one bounded aggregate test command after focused verification.

red.outcome: GREEN baseline: 168 files and 1256 tests passed before this slice.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 168 passed (168); Tests 1258 passed (1258); Duration 19.66s.

questions: Hosted AI acceptance, viewer screenshot context, conversation persistence hydration/deletion, agent tool rounds, desktop MCP lifecycle, permission UI, and clean-host evidence remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
